chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3751 of 2016 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 08-04-2025 None present for the petitioner. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent department. This petition is pending since 2016 without any significant progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
